# ユーザーストーリー

**Project**: TaskFlow - Project Management SaaS
**Mode**: Full
**Generated by**: requirements_designer

---

## US-001: Quick Task Creation / 素早いタスク作成

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                                                  |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **ID**           | US-001                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Title**        | Quick Task Creation                                                                                                                                    |
| **Story**        | As a **team member**, I want to **create tasks quickly with minimal required fields** so that **I can capture ideas without breaking my workflow**.    |
| **ストーリー**   | **チームメンバー**として、**最小限の必須フィールドで素早くタスクを作成したい**。それは**ワークフローを中断せずにアイデアを記録できるようにするため**。 |
| **Priority**     | Must                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Story Points** | 5                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Source FR**    | FR-001                                                                                                                                                 |

### Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin)

```gherkin
Feature: Quick Task Creation

  Scenario: Create task with minimum fields
    Given I am logged in as a team member
    And I am on any page in the project
    When I press Ctrl+N
    Then a task creation dialog appears with focus on the title field

  Scenario: Save task with title only
    Given I am in the task creation dialog
    When I enter "Fix login bug" as the title
    And I click "Save"
    Then the task is created with status "Todo" and priority "Medium" (default)
    And I see a success toast "Task created"

  Scenario: Create task with all fields
    Given I am in the task creation dialog
    When I fill in title "Fix login bug"
    And I set priority to "High"
    And I assign to "john@example.com"
    And I set due date to "2026-04-15"
    And I click "Save"
    Then the task is created with all specified fields
```

---

## US-002: Visual Task Progress / 視覚的なタスク進捗

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                                                          |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **ID**           | US-002                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Title**        | Visual Task Progress on Kanban Board                                                                                                                           |
| **Story**        | As a **team member**, I want to **see all tasks on a Kanban board and move them by dragging** so that **I can quickly understand project status at a glance**. |
| **ストーリー**   | **チームメンバー**として、**カンバンボードで全タスクを見てドラッグで移動したい**。それは**プロジェクトの状況を一目で把握できるようにするため**。               |
| **Priority**     | Must                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Story Points** | 8                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Source FR**    | FR-002                                                                                                                                                         |

### Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin)

```gherkin
Feature: Kanban Board Drag and Drop

  Scenario: Move task between columns
    Given I am on the Board view
    And there is a task "Fix login bug" in the "Todo" column
    When I drag "Fix login bug" to the "In Progress" column
    Then the task moves to "In Progress"
    And the task status updates to "In Progress"

  Scenario: Real-time update for other users
    Given User A moves "Fix login bug" to "In Progress"
    When User B is viewing the same board
    Then User B sees the task move to "In Progress" within 1 second

  Scenario: Offline resilience
    Given I lose network connection
    When I drag a task to another column
    Then the move is queued locally
    And when connection restores, the change syncs automatically
```

---

## US-003: Sprint Velocity Tracking / スプリント速度追跡

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                                                                |
| ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **ID**           | US-003                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Title**        | Sprint Planning with Burndown                                                                                                                                        |
| **Story**        | As a **project manager**, I want to **plan sprints and track progress with a burndown chart** so that **I can predict delivery dates and identify blockers early**.  |
| **ストーリー**   | **プロジェクトマネージャー**として、**スプリントを計画しバーンダウンチャートで進捗を追跡したい**。それは**納期を予測し早期にブロッカーを特定できるようにするため**。 |
| **Priority**     | Must                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Story Points** | 13                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Source FR**    | FR-003                                                                                                                                                               |

### Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin)

```gherkin
Feature: Sprint Planning

  Scenario: Create a new sprint
    Given I am a project manager
    When I create a sprint "Sprint 1" from "2026-04-01" to "2026-04-14"
    And I add 10 tasks totaling 50 story points
    And I click "Start Sprint"
    Then the sprint status changes to "Active"
    And a burndown chart appears showing the ideal line

  Scenario: Burndown updates daily
    Given Sprint 1 is active with 50 story points
    When 3 tasks (15 points) are completed on day 2
    Then the burndown chart shows actual line at 35 points on day 2

  Scenario: Sprint completion
    Given all tasks in Sprint 1 are done
    When I click "Complete Sprint"
    Then a sprint summary shows velocity, completed points, and carryover
```

---

## US-004: Team Collaboration Setup / チームコラボレーション設定

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                                                  |
| ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **ID**           | US-004                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Title**        | Invite and Manage Team Members                                                                                                                         |
| **Story**        | As a **project owner**, I want to **invite team members and assign roles** so that **the right people have the right level of access to the project**. |
| **ストーリー**   | **プロジェクトオーナー**として、**チームメンバーを招待し役割を割り当てたい**。それは**適切な人が適切なレベルのアクセス権を持てるようにするため**。     |
| **Priority**     | Must                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Story Points** | 5                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Source FR**    | FR-004                                                                                                                                                 |

### Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin)

```gherkin
Feature: Team Member Management

  Scenario: Invite a new member
    Given I am the project owner
    When I invite "alice@example.com" with role "Member"
    Then an invitation email is sent within 30 seconds
    And the invitation appears in the pending list

  Scenario: Accept invitation
    Given I received an invitation email
    When I click the invitation link
    Then I am added to the project with "Member" role
    And I can see the project board

  Scenario: Change member role
    Given "alice@example.com" is a Member
    When I change their role to "Admin"
    Then they gain admin permissions immediately
```

---

## US-005: Stay Informed / 情報の把握

| Field            | Value                                                                                                                                                             |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **ID**           | US-005                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Title**        | Real-time Activity Notifications                                                                                                                                  |
| **Story**        | As a **team member**, I want to **receive real-time notifications for relevant changes** so that **I can respond quickly without constantly checking the board**. |
| **ストーリー**   | **チームメンバー**として、**関連する変更のリアルタイム通知を受け取りたい**。それは**常にボードを確認しなくても素早く対応できるようにするため**。                  |
| **Priority**     | Should                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Story Points** | 8                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Source FR**    | FR-005                                                                                                                                                            |

### Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin)

```gherkin
Feature: Real-time Notifications

  Scenario: Task assignment notification
    Given I am logged in
    When another user assigns me to task "Fix login bug"
    Then I see a notification badge on the bell icon within 2 seconds
    And the notification panel shows "You were assigned to Fix login bug"

  Scenario: Click notification to navigate
    Given I have an unread notification about "Fix login bug"
    When I click the notification
    Then I am navigated to the task detail view
    And the notification is marked as read

  Scenario: Mute project notifications
    Given I have muted notifications for "Project Alpha"
    When a task is assigned to me in "Project Alpha"
    Then I do not receive an in-app notification
    But the notification still appears in my notification history
```
